publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2025-10-23 00:04:26 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Xerox Revolutionaries was a zine distribution service created by Hank Thigpen in 1999 that distributed over a hundred different issues of queer punk zines. The collection contains zines and zine flats, ephemera, correspondence, and business materials related to the operation of Xerox Revolutionaries as well as personal items from Thigpen.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Xerox Revolutionaries: Paper Zines for Queer Punks was created in 1999 by Hank Thigpen. After being active in the queercore cultural scene in Atlanta in the late 1990s, Thigpen moved back to Tallahassee, Florida, and missed a thriving queer punk community. In response, Thigpen created Xerox Revolutionaries (XR) Distro in 1999 to make and distribute zines about queer punk music to "make a few trans folks and dirty queers a little less lonely." The distro came about during what could be called the third wave of "queercore," the LGBT-identified branch of underground punk and hardcore music that had been defined by zines such as JD's, Homorcore, and Outpunk in years prior. Xerox Revolutionaries distributed over a hundred different issues of zines; publishers supplied Thigpen with "flats" ready to copy, and he filled orders on demand. In addition, Thigpen would bring bags of zines to venues in and around Tallahassee where any queer punk band played. Xerox Revolutionaries ceased distribution around 2005.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: The Hank Thigpen Xerox Revolutionaries collection (1999-2005) contains original queer punk zines and zine flats, as well as art, flyers, stickers, ephemera, correspondence, and business receipts related to the operation of Xerox Revolutionaries, a zine distribution service operated from Thigpen's home in Tallahassee, Florida. The collection also includes two personalized messenger bags and a spike-adorned trucker hat from Thigpen.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Hank Thigpen Xerox Revolutionaries collection, #7922. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Him? That's Billy, He Hits on Everyone
Subseries IIa. Catalogs and working files

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original pages of Summer 2004 catalog in printing order. Also includes materials from other catalog years.

did.unittitle: Kweer Corps International/U.S. Kweer Corps promotional materials
Letter from Hank about the future of XR

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Labels for cassettes and song lists for Dance Like You're Fighting mixtape and U.S. Kweer Corps Wants You mixtape.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Skinhead fact sheet, hand drawn U.S. Kweer Corps flyers, and other event and project flyers.

did.unittitle: Queer Zine Archive Project submission forms

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Order history blanks and XR address labels

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Predominantly contains invoices and order histories. Also includes correspondence from zine creators, distributors, and friends of Thigpen.

did.unittitle: Anti-Capitalist Tranny Brigade, Amanda La Vita

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Girl On gIRL Productions catalog

did.unittitle: A Reader's Guide to the Underground Press

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes zine sent to Thigpen for consideration

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence from various zine creators and distributors regarding reviews and distribution.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence from various individuals, inlcuding zine creators and distributors. Also includes addresses, promotional materials for events and other zine distributors.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Folder also contains photocopies of zine covers and mixtape covers contained in the colloection.

did.unittitle: Dance Like You're Fighting / Fight Like You're Dancing
U.S. Kweer Corps Wants You Vol. 1
